name: Conversational Q&A Agent with Web Research
description: Takes a user question with optional image context, researches the topic via Exa web search, uses Claude AI to generate a comprehensive conversational answer, and posts the response to Slack with source citations. Adapted from n8n's Conversational AI Chatbot with Google Gemini for text and image.

source.originalName: Conversational AI Chatbot with Google Gemini for Text & Image | Telegram

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

question.description: The user's question to research and answer

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

conversationContext.description: Previous conversation context or follow-up information

responseStyle.description: Response style: conversational, technical, brief, detailed

steps.name: Build Exa search query from question
Build Claude prompt for conversational answer
Build Slack Block Kit conversational response
